rulings.Case Title: CBS OUTDOOR INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. MARK RUTHERFORD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Cbs Outdoor, Inc'S Demurrer To Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 9, 2010, line 7, Cross-Defendant CBS Outdoor, Inc.'s Demurrer To Cross-Complaint. AS A PRELIMINARY MATTER, THE COURT DOES NOT REACH THE FACTUAL ISSUE OF WHO (QUOTE) OWNS (CLOSED QUOTE) THE SIGNS IN THIS DEMURRER. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES) FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY, OR TO IDENTIFY THE STATUTORY SCHEME VIOLATED, OR OTHER UNFAIR CONDUCT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD AND MISREPRESENTATION TO PLEAD REPRESENTATIONS MADE TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT, KNOWLEDGE, INTENT AND JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CBS OUTDOOR INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. MARK RUTHERFORD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Cbs Outdoor, Inc'S Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 9, 2010, line 7, Cross-Defendant CBS Outdoor, Inc.'s Motion To Strike. DENIED. THE CHALLENGED CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT BASED ON THE CROSS-DEFENDANT'S PROTECTED FREE SPEECH OR PETITIONING ACTIVITY WITHIN THE MEANING OF THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION RAISE ONLY COLLATERAL OR INCIDENTAL FACTS WITH RESPECT TO ANY CONDUCT FALLING WITHIN THE APPLICABLE DEFINITION OF THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTORY SCHEME. SEE WANG V. WAL-MART REAL ESTATE BUSINESS TRUST (2007) 153 CAL.APP.4TH 790. DEFENDANT ESTABLISHES THE REQUISITE PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE CHALLENGED CAUSES OF ACTION. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES DENIED, MOTION NOT FRIVOLOUS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DANILO MOLIERI VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLILIZATION AND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 9, 2010, line 5, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST CALIFORNIA & PIERCE APARTMENTS, L.P.'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION. OVERRULED, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. ALTHOUGH THE COURT MAY PROPERLY TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE RENT BOARD DECISION, THE COURT MAY NOT ACCEPT AS TRUE THE RENT BOARD'S FINDINGS OF FACT ON ISSUES IN DISPUTE IN THE PRESENT CASE. FACTUAL ISSUES ARE NOT APPROPRIATELY RAISED AND DECIDED ON DEMURRER. =(302/CWW)
